title: Basic AI-Powered Web App

title: Intermediate AI-Powered Web App

title: Advanced AI-Powered Web App Project
description: Build a small application that applies AI API integration (OpenAI/HuggingFace), TensorFlow.js basics, Browser-based ML inference in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging AI-Powered Web App
description: The following code has bugs related to AI API integration (OpenAI/HuggingFace). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring AI-Powered Web App
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with AI API integration (OpenAI/HuggingFace) and TensorFlow.js basics.
